clients_subtitle: Browse the list of clients and open their price lists.
clients_table_hint: Select a client to open their price list.
name: Name
client_price_list_subtitle: Manage product prices for the selected client
price_list_help_title: How does the client price list work?
price_list_help_body: Enter a price and toggle the switch to use a custom price for the client. When the switch is off, the product has no client price (it may use a default price if you have it in the system).
price_schedule_help_body: You see the currently effective price and scheduled (future) changes. Add a new entry using the modal. We do not edit existing records – future ones can be removed.
price_list_table_hint: Set a price for the product and decide if it should apply to this client
price_modal_hint: Choose a product, set the effective date and enter net or gross price. The other value will be calculated automatically using VAT%.
missing_prices_body: Some products do not currently have an effective price (no record with date ≤ today) or the price is 0. Products without a set price will not be shown to the client as available to order. Please fill them to avoid pricing/production errors.
price_required: Enter a price greater than zero.
delete_only_future: Deletion possible only for prices with a future date (today < * Valid from *).
valid_from_must_be_future: The * Valid from * date must be later than today (choose a future date).
import_price_list_subtitle: Upload JSON file with prices for the client
import_price_list_modal_hint: Select a JSON file containing the price list data. The file will be sent to the API for processing.
import_price_list_warning: Import will not overwrite currently active prices. New prices will take effect from the selected date only. Please wait for confirmation.
import_price_list_failed: Price list import failed. Check file format.
import_valid_from_hint: Prices from the imported file will take effect from this date. Must be a future date.
import_valid_from_required: Please specify the date from which the price list should take effect.
import_valid_from_must_be_future: The effective date must be later than today (choose a future date).
invalid_file_format: Invalid file format. Please select a JSON file.
file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
invalid_json_file: Invalid JSON file. Please check the file content.
file_read_error: Error reading file. Please try again.
